title: Dashboards - Expand Number of Boards Feeding

posts.author: Paolo (Paolo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there

as i reported here Workload of employees - #36 by chriswillson, in my opinion, you should take in consideration to expand the number of boards that feed a dashboard

I give you a real example: in my case, with the PRO Plan, 10 boards are not enough to connect all the ongoing projects in order to get a complete picture whereas my team is spending his time with the new workload widget

For me a better division should be like this:

  • Basic 3
  • Standard 10
  • PRO 25
  • Enterprise 50

I hope you will consider my request in a near future

Best
Paolo

posts.author: marcbrown (Marc Brown)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree Paolo. I hope they increase the limit. Very frustrating!

posts.author: gusz (Gustavo Rosa Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
much more than 25 in PRO…

man this is supposed to be a project management tool that can connect your whole enterprise…those guys are shitting in our heads with this limitation. To use the software in its maximum power you need to integrate in a systemic way…but then the capacity for analysis has this limitation…like they do not understand their own offer

posts.author: Concept (Alex)
posts.cookedHtml:
I agree.
Im on PRO, using monday.com for all our office need.
But I don’t use dashboard at all as it’s very limited!
It’s really a shame and I contacted them a lot about it.
It should be with very high limit, more like 100-200.
